name: microsoft-365-team
purpose: Drop-in pack for Microsoft Solution Engineers. Two files: factory_agent.py (plants new MS-themed neighborhoods under your GitHub handle in 4 modes: local/private/public/egg) + microsoft-365-team.egg (the canonical content — 11 agents including WorkIQ for M365 access, MS-stack-shaped Twin with field patterns for Copilot Studio / Power Platform / consent delays, plus the canonical workflow gate set). Sneakernet-portable per the kernel two-file rule. PII never enters the planted repo by default per PUBLIC_PRIVATE_BOUNDARY §1.5.

factory_agent.py.purpose: Drop into local brainstem agents/. Run NeighborhoodFactory to plant.

microsoft-365-team.egg.purpose: Template content (11 agents). The factory pulls + customizes this at plant time.
